Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JOHN DECKER, SHARON DECKER'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege all elements of fraud with particularity, including misrepresentation, reasonable reliance, and damages. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)
